overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a science fiction game showing a character in armored spacesuit exploring an industrial outpost on a dusty, hazy planet. The character walks past a large multi-wheeled transport vehicle and continues through a settlement with metal structures, shipping containers, and transitions from concrete pavement to reddish dirt ground.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial loading bay with parked transport rover

agents.ego_description: walking alongside a massive multi-wheeled transport vehicle in a dusty industrial settlement

entered.detail: massive industrial rover with eight large wheels and a metal cage cargo bed
large metal warehouse building with corrugated panels
complex of industrial buildings with pipes and scaffolding

segments.scene_description: The character walks alongside a massive parked transport rover in a dusty industrial yard. The environment features metal warehouse structures and processing plants in the hazy background, with concrete pavement underfoot.

events.description: passing the large rover and entering the open container storage area

agents.ego_description: walking past the rover toward blue shipping containers and metal barricades

entered.detail: standard blue shipping container with white markings
tall metal fence with vertical bars blocking access
orange and white striped construction barrier

segments.scene_description: Having passed the large rover, the character continues through an open industrial yard featuring a blue shipping container ahead and metal security barriers. An orange warning barrier appears on the left as the character approaches the transition to a dirt area.

scene_state.functional_zone: dusty industrial yard with reddish soil

events.description: transitioning from concrete pavement to reddish dirt ground

agents.ego_description: walking onto the reddish dirt surface toward industrial stair structures

entered.detail: reddish-brown dusty soil covering the ground
piles of discarded metal sheets and equipment

segments.scene_description: The ground transitions from concrete to reddish dirt as the character enters a dusty yard area. The blue container recedes to the left while an industrial staircase structure becomes prominent on the right, with scattered metal debris visible on the ground.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a hazy industrial outpost that transitions from a paved loading area to a dusty, reddish dirt yard. It begins with the character walking alongside a massive parked transport rover, flanked by metal warehouse structures and processing plants in the distance. As the character passes the rover, the scene opens into a wider yard featuring a blue shipping container and metal security barriers, with an orange warning barrier appearing on the left. The environment then shifts as the concrete pavement gives way to reddish dirt, causing the blue container to recede while an industrial staircase structure and scattered metal debris become prominent on the right.
